data.content: Shipment review approved. All 3 feature-branch commits tagged. Merge commit 3d2f79d6 is HEAD of main, CI green (run 23642289136). Code review confirms: shared update trigger extracted to version-update-action.ts, banner renders visible Update now link only when updateAvailable, both banner and badge use useVersionUpdateAction hook. Tests cover banner action rendering, click routing, clipboard success/failure. No invariants to verify. No regressions found.
